title: HMRC’s voluntary, community and social enterprise action plan for 2025 to 2026
body: "The purpose of our action plan is to outline initiatives we are putting in place to raise the proportion of HMRC procurement expenditure with voluntary, community and social enterprises (VCSEs). Our action plan focuses on 5 main areas:   promoting the VCSE agenda simplifying the procurement process  VCSE engagement supply chain engagement improving VCSE data collection   "
